name: Oracle
description: I have an end in mind for you.

abilities.name: Prognosticate
abilities.description: Accurately predicts where the next will spawn.

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Curse
abilities.description: Grants Oracle bonus outgoing spell damage amplification per hero level. Spell Damage Amp per Hero Level: 1%.

abilities.name: Clairvoyant Cure
abilities.description: Grants Oracle bonus outgoing heal amplification per hero level. Heal Amp per Hero Level: 0.75% This ability levels up with Oracle. Heal Amp per Hero Level: 0.75%.

abilities.name: Fortune's End
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel only on the unit-targeted allied unit upon projectile impact. Applies a buff that continously basic dispels corresponding to the max channel time. Cast Range: 850. Effect Radius: 350. Max Channel Time: 2.5. Min Root Duration: 0.75 (1.25). Max Root Duration: 2.75 (3.25). Damage: 100/160/220/280 (200/260/320/380). Cooldown: 18/14/10/6. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Fate's Edict
abilities.description: Enraptures the affected unit, disarms and set its magic resistance to the max value. Cast Range: 700. Set Magic Resist: 100%. Duration: 3.5/4/4.5/5. Disarm Duration: 3.5/4/4.5/5. An unbreakable prophecy resounds: a chosen ally shall briefly suffer no magics. Other kinds of suffering however.. Cooldown: 17/14/11/8. Mana Cost: 70.

abilities.name: Purifying Flames
abilities.description: Deals damage to the affected unit before causing them to heal over time. The damage increasing talent does not increase the damage applied to allied units. Cast Range: 850. Damage: 90/180/270/360 (112.5/225/337.5/450). Heal per Second: 15/25/35/45. Duration: 10. Ally Damage: 90/180/270/360. Mana Cost: 2.5.

abilities.name: Rain of Destiny
abilities.description: Bring forth rain that damage and applies an incoming heal reduction for all affected enemy units within an area-targeted location. Cast Range: 650. Radius: 650. Damage per Second: 30. Heal Reduction: 15%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Duration: 10. Mana Cost: 40.

abilities.name: False Promise
abilities.description: Applies a strong dispel on the affected allied hero upon cast. Delays certain health restoration sources and all incoming damage sources until the ability duration ends. Any healing that is delayed is doubled at the end of the duration. Grants invisibility with a fade delay, base attack time reduction, and bonus outgoing spell amplification for the duration. Cast Range: 700/850/1000. Health Regen Counter Factor: 2. Heal Counter Factor: 2. Damage Counter Factor: 1. Duration: 7/8.5/10 (8.5/10/11.5). Armor Bonus: (8). Cooldown: 110/85/60. Mana Cost: 100/150/200.
